name: Spinach and Pasta Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cooked chopped spinach, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, melt margarine over high heat. Sprinkle with flour and stir quickly to combine.
2. Continuing to stir, cook for 30 seconds.
3. Gradually stir in milk and chicken broth. Reduce heat to medium-high and cook, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens slightly (about 3 minutes).
4. Add pasta and spinach, and stir well to combine; set aside.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. In a medium mixing bowl, combine ricotta cheese, 1 ounce mozzarella cheese, the egg substitute, and 1 tablespoon parmesan cheese. Add the spinach mixture and stir to combine.
7. Spray a 1-quart casserole dish with nonstick cooking spray and add the spinach-cheese mixture to the casserole.
8. Sprinkle with remaining cheeses and bake until the cheeses are melted (about 20 minutes).
